final_answer:
Perfect. Yes, use `gilt`/`GILT` as the canonical replacement.

Here are the main trace areas and what to rename:

1. Core chain identity
- [params/config.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc/params/config.go): `bsc` network label, `IsInBSC`, “Parlia (proof-of-staked--authority)” branch naming
- [consensus/parlia/parlia.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc/consensus/parlia/parlia.go): “consensus engine of BSC” wording
- [core/systemcontracts/upgrade.go](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc/core/systemcontracts/upgrade.go): many `bsc-genesis-contract` commit URLs/comments

Rename target:
- `bsc` -> `gilt`
- `BSC` -> `GILT`

2. Genesis-contract package + contract names
- [package.json](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/package.json), [pyproject.toml](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/pyproject.toml): `bsc-genesis-contract`
- [BSCValidatorSet.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/contracts/BSCValidatorSet.sol)
- [BSCGovernor.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/contracts/BSCGovernor.sol)
- [BSCTimelock.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/contracts/BSCTimelock.sol)
- interfaces/import paths with `IBSC...`

Rename target:
- `bsc-genesis-contract` -> `gilt-genesis-contract`
- `BSCValidatorSet` -> `GiltValidatorSet`
- `BSCGovernor` -> `GiltGovernor`
- `BSCTimelock` -> `GiltTimelock`
- `IBSC...` -> `IGilt...`

3. Native token naming leftovers
- [StakeHub.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeHub.sol), [StakeCredit.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/contracts/StakeCredit.sol): many `BNB` field/function names
- [wbnb/WBNB.sol](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/wbnb/WBNB.sol): `Wrapped BNB`, `WBNB`

Rename target:
- `BNB` (native token context) -> `GILT`
- `WBNB` -> `WGILT`

4. Config/env/script naming
- [foundry.toml](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/foundry.toml): `RPC_BSC`
- [check-bsc-hardfork-bytecode.ts](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bsc-genesis-contract/scripts/check-bsc-hardfork-bytecode.ts): script name/content

Rename target:
- `RPC_BSC` -> `RPC_GILT`
- `check-bsc-*` -> `check-gilt-*`

Recommended execution order:
1. Non-breaking text/config/file-name rename pass  
2. Contract/interface rename + import updates  
3. ABI regeneration + core call-site alignment  
4. Fresh chain boot + full smoke test

If you want, I’ll start the actual rename pass now in that exact order.
